zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：短期震荡偏多趋势
zh.content:
当前SOL价格在$65.36附近震荡，较前一日微幅上涨0.34%，显示多空力量暂时均衡。从20日简单移动平均线(SMA20)64.22来看，价格略高于均线，短期偏多趋势依旧占优，但波动幅度有限。

MACD指标当前为0.515，尚无信号线对比，但数值处于正区域，表明多头动能尚存，买入压力略占上风。若MACD持续上行并形成金叉，将进一步强化上涨信号，反之需警惕回调风险。

支撑位方面，$65为短期关键支撑，若跌破可能测试$64附近的SMA20区域；阻力位在$66附近，多次触及未能突破，短期可能形成横盘整理。价格在支撑与阻力间运行，短线交易者需关注突破方向。

交易策略上，可考虑在支撑位附近逢低布局，止损设置略低于$64以控制风险；若价格突破$66并伴随成交量放大，可顺势加仓以捕捉潜在反弹。稳健投资者建议观望，等待更明确趋势信号再入场。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
SOL/USD is trading at 65.36, holding modest gains of 0.34% over the past 24 hours and remaining near the session high of 65.59. Price action above the 20-period simple moving average at 64.22 suggests a constructive short-term trend, with buyers maintaining control after recent consolidation. The narrow daily range between 65.05 and 65.59 indicates a period of reduced volatility, often preceding a stronger directional move as market participants assess the next catalyst.

Technical indicators currently lean bullish. The MACD value of 0.515 indicates positive momentum and supports the view that upward pressure remains intact. Although the signal line is unavailable, a positive MACD reading generally reflects strengthening buying interest. The absence of RSI data limits overbought or oversold assessment, but price remaining comfortably above the SMA(20) reinforces the view that the prevailing trend continues to favor the upside unless support levels begin to weaken.

From a key levels perspective, immediate support is located around 65.05, corresponding to the session low, with secondary support near the SMA(20) at 64.22. A break below 64.22 could trigger a deeper pullback toward the 63.50 region. On the upside, resistance is emerging near 65.60, the recent intraday high. Sustained trading above this level could open the path toward the psychological 66.00 area, followed by higher resistance zones if momentum accelerates.

For traders, the current setup favors a cautiously bullish approach while price remains above 64.22. Momentum-oriented participants may look for a confirmed breakout above 65.60 before initiating long positions, targeting extensions toward 66.00 and beyond. More conservative traders may prefer waiting for a pullback toward support to improve risk-reward conditions. Risk management remains essential, as a decisive move below 64.22 would weaken the bullish structure and increase the probability of short-term downside pressure.
